rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE MAGILAVY FAMILY TRUST ESTABLISHED JUNE 5, 1989 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Simone Thomass General Demurrer To Petition Of Maureen Magilavy; Notice Of Hearing; Memorandum; Declaration Of Ccp 430.41 Compliance
rulings.Rulings: The demurrer is overruled. A demurrer assumes the truth of the petition's allegations and cannot be premised on the respondent's assumption that she will prevail on her contentions. As pleaded, petitioner clearly has standing as either a beneficiary, a trustee, or both. Respondent will have the opportunity during the litigation to try to prove the invalidity of the later amendments on which this petition relies. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise other parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:00 p.m. Tuesday, April 17, 2018.
